landscape: Northern hemisphere sun angle (shadows cast slightly forward/right)

verdict.moderator_pairing_notes: Moderator correctly identified a consensus among the active agents (Landscape, Botanics, Meta) and terminated the process. While the consensus was factually wrong (Spain vs Uruguay), the moderation logic was sound based on the agents' outputs.
verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge failed to identify the image as Uruguay, predicting Spain instead. The judge relied on the 'Majority Signal' of soft evidence (Mediterranean landscape) while ignoring the 'Hard Constraints' (or lack thereof) and the possibility of the Southern Hemisphere. The prediction was incorrect.
